## Code of Conduct
We strive to create a safe and inclusive community around our web app. To achieve this, we ask that all contributors, users, and visitors adhere to the following code of conduct:

1. Be respectful and considerate.
Treat everyone with respect and kindness, regardless of their background, race, gender, sexual orientation, religion, or any other characteristic. Do not use derogatory language or engage in personal attacks or harassment.

2. Foster a welcoming environment.
Create a welcoming and inclusive environment for all users and contributors. Encourage and support new contributors, and provide constructive feedback in a respectful manner.

3. Maintain a high standard of quality.
We are committed to providing high-quality educational materials for our users. We expect all contributors to maintain a high standard of quality and to take responsibility for their contributions.

4. Respect intellectual property.
Respect the intellectual property rights of others. Do not use content, code, or other materials without proper attribution or permission.

5. Report violations.
If you witness any behavior that violates this code of conduct, please report it to the moderators or administrators of the web app. We will investigate and take appropriate action.

6. Consequences of violating the code of conduct.
Violations of this code of conduct may result in a warning, suspension, or permanent ban from the web app, at the discretion of the moderators or administrators. We reserve the right to remove any content that violates this code of conduct.

7. Changes to the code of conduct.
We may revise this code of conduct from time to time. We will notify all users and contributors of any changes and provide an opportunity for feedback.
